description: @font-face: family declared by the author, src chain with an unsupported woff2 candidate skipped and a local() fallback loaded; a second rule supplies the real bold face. Assertions use embedded face names: glyph ids in the content streams are not searchable as text.
visual_assertions: Heading and body render in Arial (via the @font-face local() fallback), not Helvetica.
The bold span uses the real Arial Bold face from the second @font-face rule, not synthesized strokes.
The last paragraph (undeclared family) falls back to the document font.
